title: Arm wrestling club to launch in George
description: GEORGE NEWS - An arm wrestling club will...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The club was founded in in January and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - An arm wrestling club will officially open in George on Saturday 28 February.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - An arm wrestling club will officially open in George on Saturday 28 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The High Rollers Arm Wrestling Club will be launched at Tiger's Milk at 23 Courtenay Street, starting at 11:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The club was founded this month and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route.","html":"The club was founded this month and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to one of the organisers, Willem Otto, the opening day promises to be action-packed.","html":"According to one of the organisers, Willem Otto, the opening day promises to be action-packed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There will be lucky draws and an opportunity for spectators and potential members to experience the sport up close.","html":"There will be lucky draws and an opportunity for spectators and potential members to experience the sport up close."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Enquiries: 066 163 5960 or 071 656 6141.","html":"Enquiries: 066 163 5960 or 071 656 6141."}]
bodyHtml: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The club was founded in in January and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - An arm wrestling club will officially open in George on Saturday 28 February.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - An arm wrestling club will officially open in George on Saturday 28 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The High Rollers Arm Wrestling Club will be launched at Tiger's Milk at 23 Courtenay Street, starting at 11:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The club was founded this month and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route.","html":"The club was founded this month and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to one of the organisers, Willem Otto, the opening day promises to be action-packed.","html":"According to one of the organisers, Willem Otto, the opening day promises to be action-packed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There will be lucky draws and an opportunity for spectators and potential members to experience the sport up close.","html":"There will be lucky draws and an opportunity for spectators and potential members to experience the sport up close."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Enquiries: 066 163 5960 or 071 656 6141.","html":"Enquiries: 066 163 5960 or 071 656 6141."}]

images.alt: Arm wrestling club to launch in George

teaser: The club was founded in in January and aims to grow the sport of arm wrestling in the Garden Route.
featuredCaption: Willem Otto and his son, Willem Jr, in an arm wrestling match. Photo supplied
